## Meeting Purpose

Weekly sync between ProjectMark and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, SEO performance, and website access issues.

## Key Takeaways

  - [SEO performance improving: 197 clicks in 28 days, on track for 200 clicks this month](https://fathom.video/share/jv7qyann7Ho48dJUk7bpPWD_ytajwSXA?tab=summary&timestamp=98.0)
  - Content strategy shift: Creating detailed downloadable PDFs with shorter blog versions
  - Website access issues persist: Prateek unable to access ProjectMark's Webflow dashboard

## Topics

### SEO Performance Update

  - [197 clicks in 28 days, projecting 200 clicks for the month](https://fathom.video/share/jv7qyann7Ho48dJUk7bpPWD_ytajwSXA?tab=summary&timestamp=102.0)
  - [52 clicks in the last week, highest impressions (24k) for the whole month](https://fathom.video/share/jv7qyann7Ho48dJUk7bpPWD_ytajwSXA?tab=summary&timestamp=109.0)
  - [Top-performing pages:](https://fathom.video/share/jv7qyann7Ho48dJUk7bpPWD_ytajwSXA?tab=summary&timestamp=124.0)
      - [Ultimate Consection CRM Guide](https://fathom.video/share/jv7qyann7Ho48dJUk7bpPWD_ytajwSXA?tab=summary&timestamp=124.0)
      - [Pre-Consection Meeting Guide](https://fathom.video/share/jv7qyann7Ho48dJUk7bpPWD_ytajwSXA?tab=summary&timestamp=124.0)
      - [Consection Industry Slowing Down](https://fathom.video/share/jv7qyann7Ho48dJUk7bpPWD_ytajwSXA?tab=summary&timestamp=124.0)
      - [How to Win Consection Project Interviews](https://fathom.video/share/jv7qyann7Ho48dJUk7bpPWD_ytajwSXA?tab=summary&timestamp=124.0)

### Content Strategy Refinement

  - [Shifting from multiple articles to one high-quality, detailed article at a time](https://fathom.video/share/jv7qyann7Ho48dJUk7bpPWD_ytajwSXA?tab=summary&timestamp=147.0)
  - [Creating two versions of content:](https://fathom.video/share/jv7qyann7Ho48dJUk7bpPWD_ytajwSXA?tab=summary&timestamp=159.0)
    1.  Lengthy, detailed PDF for downloadable lead magnet
    2.  Shorter blog post version to drive traffic to downloadable
  - [Gus suggests breaking down sections into smaller blog articles](https://fathom.video/share/jv7qyann7Ho48dJUk7bpPWD_ytajwSXA?tab=summary&timestamp=317.0)
  - [Prateek recommends longer version for SEO, shorter for download (contrary to usual practice)](https://fathom.video/share/jv7qyann7Ho48dJUk7bpPWD_ytajwSXA?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - Agreement to experiment with approach for 1-2 months

### New Content Topics

  - [Approved topics:](https://fathom.video/share/jv7qyann7Ho48dJUk7bpPWD_ytajwSXA?tab=summary&timestamp=606.0)
      - [How to estimate construction project scope of work](https://fathom.video/share/jv7qyann7Ho48dJUk7bpPWD_ytajwSXA?tab=summary&timestamp=481.0)
      - [CRM for construction project acquisitions](https://fathom.video/share/jv7qyann7Ho48dJUk7bpPWD_ytajwSXA?tab=summary&timestamp=481.0)
  - [Postponed topics (due to current product limitations):](https://fathom.video/share/jv7qyann7Ho48dJUk7bpPWD_ytajwSXA?tab=summary&timestamp=495.0)
      - [Marketing automation in CRM for construction industry](https://fathom.video/share/jv7qyann7Ho48dJUk7bpPWD_ytajwSXA?tab=summary&timestamp=495.0)
      - [How to track customer engagement with CRM software](https://fathom.video/share/jv7qyann7Ho48dJUk7bpPWD_ytajwSXA?tab=summary&timestamp=527.0)

### Webflow Access Issues

  - [Prateek received workflow access but can't log into ProjectMark's website](https://fathom.video/share/jv7qyann7Ho48dJUk7bpPWD_ytajwSXA?tab=summary&timestamp=623.0)
  - [Gus unable to provide working link during the call](https://fathom.video/share/jv7qyann7Ho48dJUk7bpPWD_ytajwSXA?tab=summary&timestamp=639.0)
  - [Agreement to follow up with the design team for proper access](https://fathom.video/share/jv7qyann7Ho48dJUk7bpPWD_ytajwSXA?tab=summary&timestamp=1046.0)
